all: Audit-remediation work must read ARCHITECTURE_OPPORTUNITIES.md, BUILD_SYSTEM_OPPORTUNITIES.md, EFFECT_TS_OPPORTUNITIES.md, and FP_IMMUTABILITY_OPPORTUNITIES.md before choosing fixes.
Do not edit generated artifacts: packages/**/build/**, packages/**/dist/**, generated *.d.ts, *.d.ts.map, *.js.map, editor backups, or packages/domain/src/schemas/*.js.
Use pnpm/corepack when available. Do not run build/codegen commands that write build/ or dist/ artifacts unless a stage explicitly approves it.
Run audit gates serially because API and tmux E2E use the hard-coded local server port 3000.

flag-hack-audit-gated.description: Flag Hack audit remediation workflow with generated-file guardrails and unit, performance, Effect API, and tmux CLI E2E gates.

stages.title: Plan audit finding remediation
stages.description: Read the four audit docs, choose bounded findings, name touched source files, and identify required gates before editing.
promptInstructions: Read ARCHITECTURE_OPPORTUNITIES.md, BUILD_SYSTEM_OPPORTUNITIES.md, EFFECT_TS_OPPORTUNITIES.md, and FP_IMMUTABILITY_OPPORTUNITIES.md.
Plan only source/config/docs/test changes. Do not edit packages/**/build/**, packages/**/dist/**, generated declarations/maps, editor backups, or packages/domain/src/schemas/*.js.
Name the expected gates: pnpm generated:guard, pnpm check, pnpm test:unit, pnpm test:perf, pnpm test:api, and pnpm test:e2e:tmux.
stages.purpose: Plan bounded remediation for selected audit findings before editing.
acceptanceChecks: Generated-file policy is part of the plan
isolationBoundary: Do not edit implementation files during planning
Do not broaden beyond the selected audit findings

stages.title: Implement bounded audit remediation
stages.description: Make the smallest source/config/docs/test change for the planned audit finding while preserving generated-file guardrails.
promptInstructions: Use TDD for observable behavior changes. Add or update focused tests first when a harness exists.
Do not edit packages/**/build/**, packages/**/dist/**, *.d.ts, *.d.ts.map, *.js.map, editor backups, or packages/domain/src/schemas/*.js.
Use pnpm/corepack if available. If install or lockfile update cannot run, make source/config changes and report the blocker exactly.
stages.purpose: Implement the selected audit remediation within the approved write scope.
acceptanceChecks: Gate commands are added or updated when needed
isolationBoundary: Do not run build/codegen that writes build/dist artifacts

stages.title: Run generated guardrails and typecheck
stages.description: Run pnpm generated:guard and pnpm check, then classify failures as code, pre-existing, or environmental.
promptInstructions: Run pnpm generated:guard && pnpm check.
Do not run codegen/build commands that write packages/**/build/** or packages/**/dist/**.
If pnpm is unavailable, run node --check for guard scripts and report the exact blocker.
stages.purpose: Verify generated-file guardrails and TypeScript health.
acceptanceChecks: pnpm check is attempted or blocked with exact reason
isolationBoundary: Do not edit files during verification

stages.title: Run unit gate
stages.description: Run pnpm test:unit for package smoke/unit coverage.
promptInstructions: Run pnpm test:unit and report exact test files or failures.
Do not edit generated artifacts while diagnosing failures.
stages.purpose: Verify unit smoke coverage for audit remediation.
isolationBoundary: Do not edit files during verification

stages.title: Run performance smoke gate
stages.description: Run pnpm test:perf and capture benchmark smoke output.
promptInstructions: Run pnpm test:perf. Treat it as a smoke benchmark until baselines are explicitly added.
Do not edit generated artifacts while diagnosing failures.
stages.purpose: Verify benchmark smoke coverage exists and runs.
isolationBoundary: Do not edit files during verification

stages.title: Run Effect API smoke gate
stages.description: Run pnpm test:api against a disposable server and validate getWorld/getLogs/getInventory/noop action.
promptInstructions: Run pnpm test:api. It owns localhost:3000 for the duration of the gate and must clean up the server child process.
If port 3000 is already occupied, report it as an environmental blocker rather than using the existing process.
stages.purpose: Verify the Effect HttpApi smoke runner against a disposable server.
isolationBoundary: Do not reuse unrelated local servers
Do not edit files during verification

stages.title: Run tmux CLI E2E smoke gate
stages.description: Run pnpm test:e2e:tmux, capture terminal output, and clean up the tmux session.
promptInstructions: Run pnpm test:e2e:tmux. It requires tmux and owns localhost:3000 while running.
Report the terminal capture path and whether the unique tmux session was cleaned up.
If tmux is unavailable, run tmux -V when possible and report the exact blocker.
stages.purpose: Verify terminal CLI smoke behavior through tmux automation.
outputs: tmux E2E evidence and capture path
acceptanceChecks: Terminal capture path is reported when tmux runs
isolationBoundary: Clean up tmux sessions on success and failure
Do not edit files during verification

stages.title: Review audit remediation and gate evidence
stages.description: Review the diff, generated-file guardrails, four audit-doc alignment, and unit/perf/API/tmux evidence.
promptInstructions: Review changed files against ARCHITECTURE_OPPORTUNITIES.md, BUILD_SYSTEM_OPPORTUNITIES.md, EFFECT_TS_OPPORTUNITIES.md, and FP_IMMUTABILITY_OPPORTUNITIES.md.
Confirm generated artifacts were not edited and pnpm generated:guard evidence is present.
Confirm unit, performance, API, and tmux E2E gate evidence is present or blockers are exact. Do not commit or push.
stages.purpose: Review the audit remediation diff and validation evidence.
outputs: Prioritized review findings or PASS report
acceptanceChecks: All four requested gate types are reviewed
isolationBoundary: Do not edit files during review
